PostFailoverProcesses: curl -sS -X POST http://openclaw:18789/hooks/agent -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Authorization: Bearer clawsql-webhook-secret' -d '{"skill":"mysql-failover","failureType":"{failureType}","failureDescription":"{failureDescription}","failedHost":"{failedHost}","failedPort":{failedPort},"failureCluster":"{failureCluster}","failureClusterAlias":"{failureClusterAlias}","countReplicas":{countReplicas},"isDowntimed":{isDowntimed},"isMaster":{isMaster},"successorHost":"{successorHost}","successorPort":{successorPort},"successorAlias":"{successorAlias}","isSuccessful":{isSuccessful},"lostReplicas":"{lostReplicas}","recoveryUID":"{recoveryUID}"}'
PostUnsuccessfulFailoverProcesses: curl -sS -X POST http://openclaw:18789/hooks/agent -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Authorization: Bearer clawsql-webhook-secret' -d '{"skill":"mysql-failover","failureType":"{failureType}","failedHost":"{failedHost}","failedPort":{failedPort},"failureCluster":"{failureCluster}","failureClusterAlias":"{failureClusterAlias}","isSuccessful":false,"isMaster":{isMaster}}'
